markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 312. Control of Highway Assets
##### § 312.061 — Definition

In this subchapter, “improvement” means the opening, straightening, widening, paving, constructing, or grading of a street, alley, sidewalk, gutter, or public way.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter, “improvement” means the opening, straightening, widening, paving, constructing, or grading of a street, alley, sidewalk, gutter, or public way.
